title: bouea macrophylla
intro: Bouea macrophylla, also known as the Langkawi buah keras or the Buah keras plant, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bouea macrophylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared in various herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
